description: Real-time event routing with sources, destinations, streams, and operators

definition_parts.description: Topology with sources, destinations, streams, operators, and compatibilityLevel

notes: Topology is graph-based: nodes reference each other via inputNodes arrays
Source types: CustomEndpoint, AzureEventHub, SampleData, AmazonKinesis, etc.
Destination types: Eventhouse, Lakehouse, CustomEndpoint, Activator
Eventhouse destination itemId must be KQL Database ID (not Eventhouse ID)
Use add-source/add-destination helpers to avoid manual definition crafting
